creator: lx@redundancy.redundancy.org
text:
On Wed, Jun 27, 2007 at 08:13:46AM -0400, Jason E. Hale wrote:
> I fixed the environment in the Makefile.  Didn't catch it since I had that 
> variable set already.  Here is a new shar.

It looks like some line breaks crept into that shar, causing it to not
extract. Can you please re-send with line wrapping off in your e-mail
client/editor? I can try and put it together, but I'd rather see exactly 
what you intended.

Thanks,
David
